# Document-Code Coupling Gate

<!-- generated by go run ./cmd/repoctl docs generate; do not edit by hand -->

Structured document sources, generated Markdown, implementation, and tests form one traceable change unit.

## Change contract

- JSON is the source for every new document covered by this gate.
- Markdown output is deterministic and cannot be edited independently.
- A linked implementation or test change requires a document-source and generated-document change in the same commit.
- A linked document change requires an implementation or test change in the same commit.
- The trace manifest uses repository-relative paths and rejects missing or escaping paths.

## Relationship to DSLRaid

The gate is a repository-governance adapter over DSLRaid's existing source, test, document, derivation, and artifact traceability model. It does not change Canonical IR, diagnostic codes, stable IDs, composition, projection, or code-generation semantics.

- Core IR remains the executable architecture source of truth.
- The JSON trace manifest is intentionally small and standard-library verifiable.
- Future integration may project these groups into DSLRaid artifacts after an ADR-backed Core IR decision.

## Commands

```sh
go run ./cmd/repoctl docs generate
go run ./cmd/repoctl docs check
go run ./cmd/repoctl trace verify
go run ./cmd/repoctl trace staged
go test ./...
```
